WITN08630100
WITN08630100

Witness Name: Iain Murphy
Statement No.: WITN08630100
Dated: 10 May 2023

POST OFFICE HORIZON ENQUIRY

FIRST WITNESS STATEMENT OF IAIN MURPHY

I, Iain Murphy, will say as follows...

1. This witness statement is made to assist the Post Office Horizon IT Inquiry (the 'Inquiry') with the matters set out in Rule 9 Request dated 14 April 2023 (the 'Request').

Background

2. I am a security professional with over 25 years security experience, mainly in Physical & People Security management.

3. I worked at the Post Office for a very brief period in my career over 10 years ago. Given the passage of time, I may struggle to remember/recollect but will try to answer the questions as accurately as I can where I can.

Page 1 of 22
